mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_NFL_CHG_TRNS ( TRNS_APY_NO, TRNS_NM, TRNS_MOBILE_NO, TRNS_PHONE_NO, TRNS_PASS, TRNS_MYSLF_CONF_METH, TRNS_STATUS_VAL, TRNS_TRNSFE_NM, TRNS_TRNSFE_MOBILE_NO, CRET_ID, CRET_DTM ) VALUES ( #{trnsApyNo}, #{trnsNm}, #{trnsMobileNo}, #{trnsPhoneNo}, #{trnsPass}, #{trnsMyslfConfMeth}, #{trnsStatusVal}, #{trnsTrnsfeNm}, #{trnsTrnsfeMobileNo}, #{cretId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO NMCP_NFL_CHG_TRNSFE ( TRNSFE_APY_NO, TRNSFE_NM, TRNSFE_MOBILE_NO, TRNSFE_RESNO, TRNSFE_MYSLF_CONF_METH, CRET_ID, CRET_DTM ) VALUES ( #{trnsfeApyNo}, #{trnsfeNm}, #{trnsfeMobileNo}, #{trnsfeResno}, #{trnsfeMyslfConfMeth}, #{cretId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_NFL_CHG_TRNS SET TRNS_STATUS_VAL = #{trnsStatusVal}, UPDT_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRNS_APY_NO = #{trnsApyNo}
